name: The Adventures of Bunny and Pig
short_description: It's a short, text-based interactive book with a psychological theme.▶TRIGGER WARNING◀ Contains childhood trauma, suicidal thoughts, and emotional abuse, but ultimately conveys hope and growth.
detailed_description:
This is more like a visual book with a psychological theme. It starts with a really sad story. You can try the free demo, which includes 50% of the full game's content, before you buy it.

--------------------------------------------------------------

Visible injuries have treatments and support, but many people live with emotional trauma for life. They pretend they’re okay, act normal, and often don’t even seek help. This story includes self-healing tips. I hope this story can help people with traumatic experiences.

If you’re interested in these topics, you can check out: Complex PTSD: From Surviving to Thriving (Pete Walker), Manipulative Parents (Isabelle Nazare-Aga) and more.

(As time goes by, some knowledge may become outdated or even replaced by new discoveries. If you’re reading this in the future and some of it is no longer accurate, it means the world has improved and better solutions now exist—which is a good thing.)

--------------------------------------------------------------
